evals.prompt: My Workfront extension isn't showing up in Workfront even though aio app dev is running. How do I make Workfront load my local build?
evals.expected_output: Set the extensionOverride key in the Workfront tab's Local Storage to your https://localhost:<port> dev URL, accept the cert, reload the layout-template page.

assertions.description: Points it at the local dev URL.

evals.prompt: How can I test a deployed stage app inside Workfront in one org without going through publish and approval?
evals.expected_output: Register the deployed app URL in Workfront's Extension Manager as a Bring Your Own extension and toggle it on.

evals.prompt: After a Chrome update my localhost extension override silently stopped working. Why?
evals.expected_output: Chrome 142+ Local Network Access blocks a public origin from reaching localhost; disable chrome://flags/#local-network-access-check.

assertions.description: Identifies the Chrome Local Network Access flag.
